sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)

prose: Fukui reactivity analysis of formaldehyde (CH₂O) was performed using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard') in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. The geometry was taken from the user-supplied .xyz file without re-optimization. Fukui indices were computed via finite-difference Mulliken charges using the N, N+1, and N-1 states. Key results: most electrophilic site = C (atom 2), f⁺ = 0.70839; most nucleophilic site = O (atom 1), f⁻ = 0.46742; dual descriptor for C = +0.59595. All integrity checks passed (sum(f⁺) = sum(f⁻) = 1.0000); trustworthy: true. No warnings reported beyond expected informational diagnostics.
